channel.title: Ubiquiti on Pablo Iranzo Gómez blog
channel.description: Recent content in Ubiquiti on Pablo Iranzo Gómez blog

item.title: Ubiquiti UniFi for WiFi network
item.description: Introduction During the pandemic I wanted to work a bit on the wireless system at home, the router provided by the ISP was having already issues that resulted in WiFi devices not connecting and only new devices were able to report ‘AP full’ message when the connection failed. First I started testing the ASUS devices like the AX92U which had WiFi 6 support. My flat is not that big, but as I had some issues with 2.
